name: GoSquared
description: GoSquared — Real-time web analytics and CRM platform with live visitor tracking and customer profiles.

seo.title: GoSquared — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: GoSquared: GoSquared — Real-time web analytics and CRM platform with live visitor tracking and customer profiles.

when_to_use: Real-time visitor tracking for conversion optimization
Live dashboard for SaaS product engagement metrics
Customer profile enrichment from web behavior data
Sales CRM triggered by real-time user activity
Retention analysis for freemium product conversion

pros: Real-time visitor tracking and live dashboards
Good for founders wanting at-a-glance metrics
cons: Less deep than Mixpanel or Amplitude for product analytics
Brand visibility has declined vs peak years
review.verdict: Friendly real-time analytics with a CRM twist; fits small teams but not product-led growth at scale.
review.best_for: Small SaaS and content sites wanting live analytics plus lightweight customer profiles.
review.not_for: Product-led SaaS needing deep cohorts, experimentation, or warehouse-native analytics.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
